title: Dressrosa Becomes the Next Target
description: Pages 6–8 focus on dressrosa becomes the next target, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Franky, Luffy, Momonosuke, Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #2 as the Straw Hats and Law reach Dressrosa, split into teams, and step into Doflamingo’s territory while the Mera Mera no Mi appears as bait.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Like I said, keep it down, Luffy!!! We're in enemy territory!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Oww!!!! I'm feeling real super this week!! Let's hurry up and find a factory or two to blow sky-high!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: I CANNOT FLY!! Nor can I enter this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What're you talking about!? You flew before, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This guy, he was flying back there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I remember nothing of the sort!! ...well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: even on the off- chance that I did...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Such a dreadful thing....!! by no means shall I ever again....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What, scared of heights or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who cares about Samura!? I'm the man who's gonna be the King of the Pirates someday, stupid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am the man who will become the Shogun of all wankuni, that I am!! You fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You think too highly of yourself, ape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy-san, your opponent is eight years old.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I apologize, Luffy-Dono. Please over- look my son's rudeness.

summary: Pages 6–8 focus on dressrosa becomes the next target, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
